description: Style NoteCrafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft strikes the right balance between style and convenience.Product DetailsBlack three-fold leather walletHas three main compartments (one zippered compartment)Has two flaps with three card holders each on one side and one photo id each on the other side Has 3 card slots and a slip pocket on one side and one coin pocket and a slip pocket on the other Branding embossed on the front Warranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care100% leatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize10 cm x 12 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
